---
title: "The Ecotechnic Future"
description: "Robin Lovelace (2011). The Ecotechnic Future. *Now Then*."
date: "2011-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_ecotechnic_2011"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Now Then"
doi: ""
publication-url: "http://nowthenmagazine.com/issue-37/the-ecotechnic-future/ http://ubuntuone.com/p/1FBU/"
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
abstract: "More captivating than any sci-fi book I’ve ever read."
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Now Then
**Year:** 2011

[URL](http://nowthenmagazine.com/issue-37/the-ecotechnic-future/ http://ubuntuone.com/p/1FBU/) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Abstract

More captivating than any sci-fi book I’ve ever read.

## Citation

Robin Lovelace (2011). The Ecotechnic Future. *Now Then*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{lovelace_ecotechnic_2011,
	title = {The {Ecotechnic} {Future}},
	copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
	url = {http://nowthenmagazine.com/issue-37/the-ecotechnic-future/ http://ubuntuone.com/p/1FBU/},
	abstract = {More captivating than any sci-fi book I've ever read.},
	journal = {Now Then},
	author = {Lovelace, Robin},
	year = {2011},
	keywords = {John Michael Greer, ecotechnic future},
	pages = {2011--2011},
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
